rationale.R1.3: The output does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure. The central claim of this section is that the proposed selective feature-fusion module substantially improves 3D detection performance in challenging conditions, but no experiments are presented to support this claim under such conditions.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not flag uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims. The output presents results as if they were achieved without any uncertainty, which is not the case given the small effect sizes and lack of statistical analysis.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression. The output introduces a new error by overclaiming the robustness of the selective fusion module without providing evidence to support it.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability. Non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason.
